title: IT Helpdesk
description:
Daily Tasks

  • IDs Administration: Manage and maintain user IDs, ensuring proper access and security protocols are followed.
  • Role-based Quota Control: Monitor and adjust user quotas based on role requirements and organizational policies.
  • Librarian Tasks: Organize and manage IT-related documentation and resources for easy access and retrieval.
  • Pin Mailer Access Logs Checks: Regularly review and verify access logs to ensure compliance with security standards.
  • Document Filing: Maintain accurate and organized filing systems for IT documents and records.
  • USB and Device Control: Monitor and control the use of USB and other external devices to prevent unauthorized data transfer.
  • Incident Reporting: Document and report IT incidents, ensuring timely resolution and communication with relevant stakeholders.

Monthly Tasks:

  • Monthly Reports: Prepare and distribute monthly reports on IT activities, incidents, and performance metrics.
  • System Maintenance/Release Logs: Maintain logs of system maintenance activities and software releases.
  • Server Maintenance: Perform routine maintenance on servers to ensure optimal performance and uptime.

Bi-annual & Annual Tasks:

  • Hardware and Software Check: Conduct comprehensive checks of hardware and software to ensure they are up-to-date and functioning correctly.

Yearly Tasks:

  • System Maintenance: Perform annual system maintenance to ensure long-term reliability and efficiency.
  • Power Shutdown/Up: Coordinate and manage power shutdowns and startups as required for maintenance or emergencies.

Ad-hoc Tasks:

  • System Release
  • Project Support
  • Other assignments

postedCompany.description:
Our HQ have over 45 years of IT performance in Japan. The Company provides IT services to its customers from a wide range of sectors including financial, public, energy and airlines industry. In recent years we putting our effort into not only the fields of system operation management and software development, furthermore, we have also been challenging ourselves in new fields such as IoT, AI, and wearable technology.

In Singapore, we focus on IT support, system operation management service delivery to our client in financial sectors. We continue targeting to provide a wider range of IT service support such as integrating operation systems, software development and other IT services, dedicating more than 45 years of IT expertise from HQ as well as local IT expertise services to our clients.

The Company's future depends on the individual growth of its employees. We wish to invite you to join us to make united efforts to increase our corporate value, based on a strong determination to compete and succeed.
postedCompany.name: INFORMATION DEVELOPMENT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
